bundle.shortDescription: SalmonApp — AI-first mail and workspace suite
bundle.longDescription: SalmonApp is an AI-first mail and personal workspace suite for Gmail / Outlook, calendar, contacts, tasks, and follow-up. It syncs mail locally, understands threads and contacts, extracts events and tasks, and turns inbox context into actionable briefings. AI runs through your locally logged-in Claude Code or Codex CLI; model credentials stay with the CLI and workspace data stays local. Linux (deb / AppImage / rpm) and macOS (dmg).
